select_when: Execution quality depends on repeating the right small behaviors rather than on one heroic effort.
The team already knows the right move, but friction, forgetfulness, or emotional variability keeps breaking follow-through.
Reliable baseline behavior is needed under stress, overload, or limited attention.
The real question is how to make good action automatic instead of re-deciding it every time.
avoid_when: The environment has changed enough that yesterday's automatic behavior is now solving the wrong problem.
Automation is being used to avoid judgment on a novel case that still requires deliberate thought.
